intro: Pilot a spacecraft across the galaxy, facing waves of incoming enemies, powerful enemy ships, and massive bosses.
description:
■ Classic Arcade Shooter
Enjoy simple, fast-paced, and thrilling action inspired by classic 2D shooters.

■ In-Combat Upgrade System
Freely enhance attributes such as fire rate, attack power, projectile speed, and weapon types as you play.

■ Diverse Enemies and Varied Attack Patterns
Unique formations and a wide variety of enemy ships constantly appear, putting you in increasingly challenging situations.

■ Stage-Based Progression
Complete all 10 stages and face steadily increasing difficulty with each level.

■ Strategic Life Management
Survive intense attacks by using your limited resources wisely, creating a challenging and rewarding experience.

■ Four Difficulty Levels
Choose from four difficulty settings, from beginner to advanced, and challenge yourself based on your skill level.

■ Score Attack for High Replayability
Beat your high score and keep pushing your limits.
